message:
Expand mesh integration tests with computation migration and RaptorQ scenarios

Add ~540 lines of new integration tests to the mesh module covering:

- RaptorQ encode/decode round-trip with configurable symbol size, repair
  ratio, chunking threshold, and decode timeout parameters
- Computation migration helper functions: test_migration_context(),
  test_computation_checkpoint(), migration_header() for constructing
  valid migration fixtures with proper zone/lease/capability bindings
- End-to-end migration lifecycle tests exercising suspend, lease handoff
  validation, checkpoint transfer (both inline and chunked encodings),
  and resume with fencing token advancement
- MigratableComputation state machine tests verifying that invalid
  transitions (e.g. resume on wrong holder, transfer with stale fencing
  token) are correctly rejected with specific error variants
- Import expanded set of fcp-core types including LeaseHandoff,
  LeaseParams, MigratableComputation, MigrationCapabilityContext,
  ComputationCheckpoint, and CheckpointTransferEncoding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
